name: Frank Pate Park
description: Frank Pate Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Port St. Joe, FL. There are 4 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Amenities include restrooms, water, and lights. The courts are free. The courts cannot be reserved.

name: Gulf County Veterans Memorial Park at Beacon Hill
description: Come play pickleball at Gulf County Veterans Memorial Park at Beacon Hill in Port St. Joe, FL! There are 4 outdoor acrylic courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Amenities include restrooms.

name: Salinas Park
description: Come play pickleball at Salinas Park in Port St. Joe, FL! There are 4 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, water, and wheelchair accessibility. The courts are free.

name: TL James Park
description: TL James Park is a place to play pickleball in Wewahitchka, FL. There is 1 outdoor hard court. This is a dedicated court with a permanent net and lines. The court is free.
